question: Will a full-scale military conflict between the US/Israel and Iran resume by May 31, 2026?
evidence: U.S. conducted 'self-defense' strikes in southern Iran on May 25, 2026, targeting missile launch sites and boats laying mines.
President Trump announced a 'letter of intent' with Iran to end hostilities and begin negotiations on Iran’s nuclear program and control over the Strait of Hormuz.
Iran's Foreign Ministry indicated that many issues had been resolved, though no deal was imminent.
U.S. and Iranian officials have agreed in principle on a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and address Iran's nuclear program.
President Trump proposed expanding the Abraham Accords to include countries like Saudi Arabia and Pakistan as part of any peace deal with Iran.
searchQueries: current US Israel Iran military conflict May 2026
raw: {"yes_probability": 0.1, "confidence": "high", "short_reason": "Recent U.S. and Israeli military actions suggest a de-escalation, with ongoing peace negotiations.", "key_evidence": ["U.S. conducted 'self-defense' strikes in southern Iran on May 25, 2026, targeting missile launch sites and boats laying mines.", "President Trump announced a 'letter of intent' with Iran to end hostilities and begin negotiations on Iran’s nuclear program and control over the Strait of Hormuz.", "Iran's Foreign Ministry indicated that many issues had been resolved, though no deal was imminent.", "U.S. and Iranian officials have agreed in principle on a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and address Iran's nuclear program.", "President Trump proposed expanding the Abraham Accords to include countries like Saudi Arabia and Pakistan as part of any peace deal with Iran."], "source_urls": ["https://apnews.com/article/01a13e9a63ece786a0a7fa4933dbf09b", "https://www.theatlantic.com/international/2026/05/trump-surrender-iran-endgame/687252/", "https://theweek.com/world-news/us-strikes-iran-talks-imminent-peace-deal", "https://www.cfr.org/global-conflict-tracker/conflict/confrontation-between-united-states-and-iran"]}
